journal_entry.reason: The donation pledge creates an expense (Charitable Contributions Expense) and a corresponding liability (Notes Payable) since Target has committed to the donation via a promissory note but has not yet made the payment. The amounts are determined directly from the transaction: $1,000,000 for both the expense and the note payable.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Target has pledged a $1,000,000 donation to a humanitarian food aid program. This creates a charitable contribution expense (debit) and a liability in the form of a promissory note payable (credit) since the donation has been committed but not yet paid. The promissory note represents a formal obligation to pay within 1 month.
